node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"իմաստու<lb xml:id=\"l104229427\" facs=\"#z104229427\" n=\"17\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նքն","line":{"facs":"#z104229426","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104229426","n":"16"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-011b"},"n":"իմաստունքն"},"M691":{"lit":"իմաստունքն","line":{"facs":"#z104011480","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104011480","n":"4"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"691-136a"},"n":"իմաստունքն"},"M7032":{"lit":"իմաստունքն","line":{"facs":"#z103992111","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103992111","n":"10"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7032-034a"},"n":"իմաստունքն"},"M892":{"lit":"իմաստունքն","line":{"facs":"#z104346308","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104346308","n":"11"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"892-188a"},"n":"իմաստունքն"},"M6712":{"lit":"իմաստ<lb xml:id=\"l104384979\" facs=\"#z104384979\" n=\"18\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ունքն","line":{"facs":"#z104384978","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104384978","n":"17"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-122b"},"n":"իմաստունքն"},"M9307":{"lit":"իմաստունքն","context":"text/body/ab[18]","n":"իմաստունքն"}}
